---
title: "The Rt. Rev. George Ridding"
---

## The Rt. Rev. George Ridding

**Dates:** (1828-1904)

### Description

headmaster of Winchester College, Bishop of Southwell

### Biography

He married, first (20 July 1858) Mary Louisa Moberly (d. 20 July 1859), and, secondly (October 1876) Lady Laura Palmer.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 23rd 1893
- Letter from June 1st [1886?]
- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Feb 22 [?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
